name: Avila University
notes: Catholic university in Kansas City. Heart of America conference. Small campus with scholarships available for competitive soccer players.

name: Benedictine College
notes: Catholic Benedictine liberal arts college in Atchison, KS. Heart of America conference. Strong faith community with competitive NAIA soccer.

name: Bethany College
notes: Small Lutheran liberal arts college in central Kansas. KCAC conference. Scholarships available with accessible admissions.

name: Bethel University
notes: Cumberland Presbyterian-affiliated university in west Tennessee. Mid-South Conference. Growing athletic programs with scholarship availability.

name: Bryan College
notes: Christian liberal arts college in the Tennessee mountains. Appalachian Athletic Conference. Faith-centered community with competitive soccer.

name: Carroll College
notes: Catholic liberal arts college in the Montana state capital. Frontier Conference. Known for NAIA football championship — soccer is growing.

name: College of Idaho
notes: Private liberal arts college near Boise. Frontier Conference. Strong academic profile for NAIA with competitive soccer and merit scholarships.

name: Concordia University Ann Arbor
notes: Lutheran university in Ann Arbor. WHAC conference. Benefits from proximity to a major college town. Competitive NAIA soccer.

name: Cornerstone University
notes: Evangelical Christian university in Grand Rapids. WHAC conference. Competitive soccer with faith-based campus culture.

name: Corban University
notes: Baptist-affiliated Christian university in Salem, OR. Cascade Collegiate Conference. Small campus with scholarships for soccer players.

name: Cumberland University
notes: Private university near Nashville. Mid-South Conference. Strong NAIA soccer program — regularly competes at national level.

name: Eastern Oregon University
notes: Public liberal arts university in eastern Oregon. Cascade Collegiate Conference. Affordable option with soccer scholarships.

name: Freed-Hardeman University
notes: Churches of Christ-affiliated university in west Tennessee. Mid-South Conference. Faith-based campus with solid soccer program.

name: Georgia Gwinnett College
notes: Rapidly growing public college in the Atlanta suburbs. NAIA independent. One of the largest NAIA schools — men's soccer has been competitive nationally with diverse international talent pool.

name: Grace College
notes: Grace Brethren-affiliated university in northern Indiana. Crossroads League. Competitive NAIA soccer with strong faith community.

name: Graceland University
notes: Community of Christ-affiliated university in Lamoni, IA. Heart of America conference. Small campus with soccer scholarships.

name: Hastings College
notes: Presbyterian-affiliated liberal arts college in Nebraska. GPAC conference. Competitive NAIA soccer with merit scholarships.

name: Huntingdon College
notes: Methodist-affiliated liberal arts college in Montgomery, AL. AMC conference. Small, close-knit campus with soccer scholarships.

name: Huntington University
notes: United Brethren in Christ-affiliated university in Indiana. Crossroads League. Competitive NAIA soccer with strong Christian community.

name: John Brown University
notes: Interdenominational Christian university in northwest Arkansas. Sooner Athletic Conference. One of the top NAIA soccer programs in the country — multiple national tournament appearances.

name: Kansas Wesleyan University
notes: Methodist-affiliated university in central Kansas. KCAC conference. Small campus with soccer scholarships for qualifying student-athletes.

name: Life University
notes: Chiropractic-focused university near Atlanta. NAIA independent. Men's soccer has been nationally competitive with strong international recruitment.

name: Marian University
notes: Catholic university in Indianapolis. Crossroads League. Strong nursing and physician assistant programs. Soccer program regularly competes at NAIA national level.

name: Tennessee Wesleyan University
notes: Methodist-affiliated university in eastern Tennessee. Appalachian Athletic Conference. Small campus with soccer scholarships available.

name: MidAmerica Nazarene University
notes: Church of the Nazarene university in the Kansas City suburb of Olathe. Heart of America conference. Faith-based campus with soccer scholarships.

name: Midland University
notes: Lutheran-affiliated university near Omaha. GPAC conference. Competitive NAIA soccer with merit and athletic scholarships.

name: Missouri Baptist University
notes: Baptist-affiliated university in suburban St. Louis. AMC conference. Urban location with growing soccer program and scholarship availability.

name: Missouri Valley College
notes: Presbyterian-affiliated liberal arts college in central Missouri. Heart of America conference. Active athletic programs with soccer scholarships.

name: Mount Mercy University
notes: Catholic Sisters of Mercy university in Cedar Rapids. Heart of America conference. Strong nursing and health programs.

name: Olivet Nazarene University
notes: Church of the Nazarene university south of Chicago. CCAC conference. Competitive NAIA soccer with proximity to Chicago recruiting base.

name: Oregon Institute of Technology
notes: Oregon's polytechnic university. Cascade Collegiate Conference. Strong engineering and health programs with competitive NAIA soccer.

name: Park University
notes: Private university near Kansas City with large international student body. Heart of America conference. Men's soccer is one of the top NAIA programs nationally with international recruiting pipeline.

name: Peru State College
notes: Nebraska's oldest college, now public liberal arts. GPAC conference. Very affordable with soccer scholarships.

name: Point University
notes: Christian university on the Georgia-Alabama border. Appalachian Athletic Conference. Faith-based community with growing soccer program.

name: University of Rio Grande
notes: Private university in rural southern Ohio. AMC conference. Affordable tuition with soccer scholarships for qualifying athletes.

name: Robert Morris University Illinois
notes: Career-focused university in Chicago. CCAC conference. Urban setting with strong soccer recruiting from Chicago's large soccer community.

name: Rocky Mountain College
notes: Ecumenical Christian college in Billings, MT. Frontier Conference. Scenic mountain setting with soccer scholarships available.

name: University of Saint Francis
notes: Franciscan university south of Chicago. CCAC conference. One of the most competitive NAIA soccer programs — multiple national championship appearances.

name: St. Thomas University
notes: Catholic university in Miami. Sun Conference. Elite NAIA soccer program — multiple national championships. Benefits from Miami's rich soccer culture and international talent pipeline.

name: University of Science and Arts of Oklahoma
notes: Oklahoma's only public liberal arts college. Sooner Athletic Conference. Affordable tuition with soccer scholarships.

name: Southeastern University
notes: Assemblies of God university in Lakeland, FL. Sun Conference. One of the fastest-growing Christian universities in the country with competitive NAIA soccer.

name: Southwest Baptist University
notes: Baptist-affiliated university in southwest Missouri. Heart of America conference. Strong ministry and health sciences with soccer scholarships.

name: Southwestern College
notes: Methodist-affiliated college in southeastern Kansas. KCAC conference. Small campus with soccer scholarships available.

name: Tabor College
notes: Mennonite Brethren-affiliated college in central Kansas. KCAC conference. Very small campus with faith-based soccer program.

name: Taylor University
notes: Interdenominational evangelical university in Indiana. Crossroads League. One of the stronger academic NAIA schools with competitive soccer.

name: University of the Cumberlands
notes: Baptist-affiliated university in southeastern Kentucky. Mid-South Conference. One of the largest NAIA schools and a major recruiter of international soccer talent.

name: University of Saint Mary
notes: Catholic Sisters of Charity university in Leavenworth, KS. Heart of America conference. Small campus with soccer scholarships.

name: Viterbo University
notes: Franciscan Catholic university in La Crosse, WI. Heart of America conference. Nursing is a top program; competitive NAIA soccer.

name: Webber International University
notes: Business-focused university in central Florida. Sun Conference. Small campus with soccer scholarships and warm-weather training year-round.

name: William Jewell College
notes: Baptist-affiliated liberal arts college in Liberty, MO near Kansas City. Heart of America conference. One of the stronger academic NAIA programs.

name: William Penn University
notes: Quaker-affiliated university in southeastern Iowa. Heart of America conference. Small campus with soccer scholarships available.

name: York College
notes: Churches of Christ-affiliated liberal arts college in south-central Nebraska. KCAC conference. Very small campus with faith-based athletic culture.
